title: Embeds API client for session management
purpose: Provides HTTP methods to fetch and delete embeds associated with sessions, handling API communication and error cases.
module_context: Exports a singleton object 'embedsApi' containing async methods for embed operations using relative URLs.

steps.content: Construct the API endpoint URL with encoded session and project parameters.
Send a GET request to the constructed URL.
IF the response indicates failure, throw an error with the status text.
Extract and return the embeds array from the parsed data.
IF parsing fails or no embeds are present, return an empty array.

methods.name: deleteEmbed
methods.normalized_params: (session: string, id: string, project: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Construct the API endpoint URL for the specific embed with encoded session and project parameters.
Send a DELETE request to the constructed URL.
IF the response indicates failure, throw an error with the status text.
Return successfully if the delete operation completes without error.
